remedy.notes: $2,500 Rule 11 sanction; ordered to notify the judge in every pending case where she appears; separately referred (with co-counsel Jo Saint-George) to the Second Circuit Grievance Panel per Ioio v. City of New York (2d Cir. Mar. 16, 2026). NOTE: the Charlotin "LexisNexis" tool tag is NOT supported — the court declined to credit LexisNexis as the source.
